segments.speaker: Classmate
segments.text: Hey, are you new to the studio?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yeah, I'm Jongkuk. I'm starting the PhD program this semester.

segments.speaker: Classmate
segments.text: Nice. I'm Maya. What were you doing before this?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I worked in architecture and research in Korea. I'm interested in housing, urban systems, and how design actually meets daily life.

segments.speaker: Classmate
segments.text: That's a good mix. Do you have a studio desk yet?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I think so, but I'm still figuring out where everything is.

segments.speaker: Classmate
segments.text: That empty one near the window might be yours.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: That would be great. Natural light is never a bad thing.

segments.speaker: Classmate
segments.text: True. Are you more of a model person or a drawing person?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Probably both, but I need time to get used to the tools here.

segments.speaker: Classmate
segments.text: You'll be fine. First week is just controlled chaos.
